from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker

Base = sqlalchemy.ext.declarative.Base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)
    age = Column(Integer)

class Post(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'posts'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = Column(String)
    content = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))

engine = sqlalchemy.create_engine('sqlite:///users.db')
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)
session = sqlalchemy.orm.sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session.commit()

def create_user(name, email, age):
    session.add(User(name=name, email=email, age=age))
    session.commit()

def query_users_by_age_range(min_age, max_age):
    results = session.query(User).filter(User.age >= min_age, User.age <= max_age)
    return results.all()

def create_post(title, content, user_id):
